callbackUrls.intro: Copy the addresses below and paste them into the PayNow merchant panel (Settings → Shops and payment points → shop configuration). They are built automatically from your shop URL.
callbackUrls.notificationHelp: Webhook that PayNow calls with payment statuses. Required for orders to be marked as paid automatically.
callbackUrls.returnHelp: Address the customer returns to from the PayNow page after finishing the payment.
callbackUrls.copyError: Copy failed — please copy the address manually
